title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
